since_last: 34% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.12%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC +2.42% · Gold +1.82% · Nasdaq100 -1.14%. 34% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.12%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.12%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.57%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +9.02%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +9.02%, ISRG +4.29%, AAPL +4.16%, ADBE +3.21%, ADBE +3.21%. Laggards: TER -8.83%, KLAC -7.99%, AMAT -6.96%, LRCX -6.95%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.54% at $158.38
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.54% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
